summary: Centralized the shared redundancy, capacity-class, and placement policy registries into one machine-checkable source, replayed the governed `headscale` production path from a separate latest-main worktree, and verified the live public edge after refreshing the fresh-worktree portal artifacts required by the shared NGINX publication role.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_shared_policy_packs.py tests/test_capacity_report.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_standby_capacity.py tests/test_failure_domain_policy.py` returned `27 passed in 0.40s`.

verification.check: Repository data-model validation uses the shared policy registry
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` completed successfully with `Repository data models OK` after the shared-policy registry refactor.

`scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:headscale`, `scripts/standby_capacity.py --service headscale`, `scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service headscale`, and `scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service headscale` all passed, confirming the ADR 0211 registry now governs the approved live-apply path.

verification.check: Fresh-worktree portal artifact recovery and production replay
verification.observed: The first `playbooks/services/headscale.yml` replay from the isolated worktree failed in `lv3.platform.nginx_edge_publication` because `build/changelog-portal/` and `build/docs-portal/` were absent in the fresh worktree. After `make generate-ops-portal generate-changelog-portal docs` populated those committed automation artifacts, the replay completed successfully with `localhost ok=16 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=72 changed=5 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=42 changed=0 failed=0`.

verification.check: Public Headscale health path after replay
verification.observed: `curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' https://headscale.lv3.org/health` and `curl -Ik https://headscale.lv3.org/health` both returned `HTTP 200`, with the shared edge security headers and `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow` still present after the replay.

notes: The first candidate live-apply target was `homepage`, but the governed preflight `scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service homepage` blocked that path under ADR 0191 because `homepage` still requires immutable guest replacement before an in-place replay.
The successful branch-local live apply therefore used `headscale`, which exercises the shared redundancy and standby policy gates without the unrelated immutable-replacement blocker.

The branch-local validation story is complete except for the intentionally deferred integration-only canonical-truth update: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs` still reports canonical truth as stale on this workstream branch, currently pointing at `changelog.md`, because ADR 0174 keeps the release and platform-version truth files for the later main-only integration step.
